sarkarversesongs: Name of the special page for listing songs
sarkarversesong-filter-category: Label for category filter dropdown (categories from individual song pages)
sarkarversesong-all-categories: Option text for showing all categories
sarkarversesong-all-themes: Option text for showing all themes
sarkarversesong-all-languages: Option text for showing all languages
sarkarversesong-showing: Text showing count of displayed songs. $1 is count shown, $2 is total count.
sarkarversesong-no-songs: Message shown when no songs match filters
sarkarversesong-col-title: Column header for song title/first line
sarkarversesong-page-info: Pagination info text. $1 is current page, $2 is total pages.
